completed_pilots.name: P1: Collision Rate - Absorption Rate Proxy Validation
completed_pilots.interpretation: Collision rate is a valid proxy for absorption rate. Strong positive correlation with bootstrap CI excluding zero.

completed_pilots.name: P2: UAD Reproducibility Validation
completed_pilots.interpretation: UAD fails to detect hierarchical absorption. Only 1/7 true positives. Root cause: token-level mutual exclusivity.

completed_pilots.name: P3: Random Baseline Validation
completed_pilots.interpretation: UAD F1 is IDENTICAL to same-cluster random F1. The clustering step provides zero value. All UAD complexity is irrelevant.

overall_decision.reason: Core UAD method fails structurally. Collision rate proxy is valid but UAD cannot exploit it.
overall_decision.new_direction: Negative result paper: 'Why Co-occurrence Clustering Cannot Detect Feature Absorption' with constructive proposals for alternatives.

key_findings: Collision rate IS a valid proxy (r=0.71 pilot, r=0.87 full)
UAD fails catastrophically (F1=0.00048, identical to random)
Root cause: absorption features are mutually exclusive at token level
All ablation variants fail similarly - problem is structural, not hyperparameter-related

future_pilot_proposals.name: Decoder Weight Similarity Pilot (Candidate B)
future_pilot_proposals.description: Compute decoder cosine similarity for 100 pairs (7 known absorption + 93 random). Expected runtime <15 min.
future_pilot_proposals.trigger: If negative result paper is well-received or next iteration begins

future_pilot_proposals.name: Causal Intervention Pilot (Candidate D)
future_pilot_proposals.description: Test 10 known absorption pairs + 10 random with activation patching. Expected runtime <30 min.
future_pilot_proposals.trigger: If decoder similarity shows promise but needs causal validation
